article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 25, 2023 (BSS) - Stocks today witnessed upward trend as major indices of both Dhaka and Chittagong Stock Exchanges were found rising with higher activities of some large-cap securities.

The DSEX, the benchmark index of the Dhaka Stock Exchange (DSE), inched up 6.46 points, or 0.1 per cent, to close at 6,325. The DS30, the blue-chip index, increased 0.1 per cent to 2,189 while the DSES, the Shariah-compliant index, went up 0.1 per cent to 1,374.

llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly reports major indices of the Dhaka and Chittagong Stock Exchanges rising, which directly matches the equity market performance scope of 'stock_market_close'.
